Setback Compliance.description: Setbacks from property boundaries per SI-02 Building Envelopes regulations
Setback Compliance.required: Setbacks must meet the minimum distances specified in the SI-02 Building Envelopes document depending on wall height, length, and boundary type.
Setback Compliance.proposed: Insufficient data provided in the input to measure setbacks from property boundaries.
Setback Compliance.comment: Setback distances from the building to property boundaries are not explicitly given in the extracted building data, preventing compliance verification.
Setback Compliance.recommendation: Provide dimensional information for building setbacks relative to all adjoining property boundaries in the site plans for full assessment.

Height and Envelope Limits.description: Building height and envelope dimensions as per SI-02 regulations
Height and Envelope Limits.required: Building height and envelope must conform to limits set by SI-02 applicable to the zoning and site classification.
Height and Envelope Limits.proposed: Building height and envelope dimensions not detailed in extracted data.
Height and Envelope Limits.comment: No specific data about building heights or envelope dimensions was available, so compliance cannot be confirmed.
Height and Envelope Limits.recommendation: Provide building elevation data and envelop dimensions to enable detailed assessment against SI-02 limits.
